_note: Role/pool config for the role-based core (roster_revision_2026-07.md). Each role is a job the book needs done, backed by a candidate `pool` and one `selected` incumbent. The collector's `sleeve_selection` scorecard scores pool members deterministically and may raise a `switch_signal`, but it NEVER auto-trades and NEVER edits `selected` — a human disposes by committing a new `selected` here. The ONE exception is the `intl_leader` role, whose selected member follows the rotation `leader_pick` automatically (a rotation decision, not a fund-quality decision; logged to OverrideHistory). `block` drives the Amplifier/Damper resolution in quadrants.py (amplifier_us / amplifier_intl / damper / cash). `quadrants` is a list of Q1-Q4 for quadrant-governed roles, or the literal "rotation" for the two intl roles (sized by intl_governance, not the US quadrant). `expense_ratio` is the static ER penalty (percent) used by the selection scorecard.

selection_config._note: Momentum blend + ER penalty for the sleeve_selection scorecard, and the hysteresis gate. A challenger must lead the incumbent by >= hysteresis_lead for >= hysteresis_runs consecutive runs before a switch_signal fires. A member is ineligible when its 120d return correlation to the role benchmark_proxy < min_benchmark_corr.

intl_config._note: International sizing ladder (intl_governance). sleeve = intl_broad base + a rotation-sized intl_leader slot. See roster_revision_2026-07.md §4.

roles.notes: US mega-cap growth. Retains the AMZN/GOOGL exposure at index weight (exempt-hold retirement).
Reflation financials (added — was missing from core).
Defensive healthcare — style diversification vs staples (added).
SHORT TIPS — inflation carry without the long real-rate duration of TIP (duration fix).
Managed-futures trend — cross-tail convexity (added). CTA inception 2022 — skip 252d window if no history.
Long-duration Treasuries (barbell long leg — separate role, NOT pooled with mid).
Intermediate Treasuries (barbell mid leg — separate role, NOT pooled with long).
Cash sleeve (SGOV) — governed by the cash-sleeve band, not the quadrant.
Broad ex-US base — carries policy weight. Member switches human-gated (scorecard proposes).
Rotation-sized leader slot — the ONE auto-selected role: selected follows intl_governance.leader_pick (logged to OverrideHistory layer intl_leader_rotation).
